PureShadow Mentioned!!

Anyways-

This is just a normal lil Pure Vanilla bot, and no, this is not my first bot. I have two accounts for J.ai and I have at least 8 on my main. I’m sorry if the description for this bot is a little bit off since I haven’t made one in a while, but I love it when people at least try to tell me if my bots need some improvements!!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

WARNING: Any comments that are calling my bots slurs or just and negative commentary will be deleted and you will be blocked.
